description: This schematic illustrates the different deformation zones on the cross-section parallel to the loading direction of a low-density high-strength Fe-Mn-Al-C steel sample after hot compression, with a vertical downward loading force P applied. Three distinct zones are marked: Zone 1 is the difficult deformation zone near the upper and lower end faces, restricted by friction between the sample and pressure head; Zone 2 is the small deformation zone distributed near the two rounded end edges; Zone 3 is the large deformation zone in the sample central area with the highest deformation degree. Non-uniform stress distribution induced by interfacial friction during hot compression leads to the formation of these zones. This schematic provides the basis for subsequent microstructure observation of different zones to analyze dynamic recrystallization behavior and microstructure evolution of the tested steel, supporting the conclusion that dynamic recrystallization degree and grain size vary with deformation magnitude in different zones.
